column1: Offline Training Kit – Restricted / Air-Gapped Environments

column2: Add API-Key / Bearer header to Web.Contents

column1: 1. Save all .json and .xml files to C:\BankTraining\ on your local machine
2. In Power Query: Home → New Source → Blank Query → Advanced Editor
3. Paste the M code from each exercise sheet into Advanced Editor
4. Update the file path in File.Contents() to match your local folder
5. When connected to internal APIs later, swap File.Contents() with Web.Contents()
